plus_jakarta_sans.name: Plus Jakarta Sans
plus_jakarta_sans.purpose: General product UI, modern SaaS, polished multi-use default

jetbrains_mono.name: JetBrains Mono
jetbrains_mono.purpose: Metadata, technical UI, stats, labels, code-adjacent surfaces

space_grotesk.name: Space Grotesk
space_grotesk.purpose: Bold display type, experimental and expressive interfaces

inter.name: Inter
inter.purpose: Minimal UI, clean content-first interfaces, flexible fallback

ibm_plex_sans.name: IBM Plex Sans
ibm_plex_sans.purpose: Enterprise software, analytical tools, Carbon-aligned structure

ibm_plex_mono.name: IBM Plex Mono
ibm_plex_mono.purpose: Dense metadata, tables, code, Carbon technical language

playfair_display.name: Playfair Display
playfair_display.purpose: Editorial, premium, tactile, luxury, or nostalgic surfaces

sf_pro.name: SF Pro
sf_pro.purpose: Apple-platform aligned interfaces and calm premium apps

roboto.name: Roboto
roboto.purpose: Material-style apps and adaptable product surfaces

outfit.name: Outfit
outfit.purpose: Soft modern SaaS, M3 pastel, clean branded dashboards

lexend.name: Lexend
lexend.purpose: Readable bold display for loud digital brands and neo-brutalism

helvetica_neue.name: Helvetica Neue
helvetica_neue.purpose: Swiss design, modernist editorial systems, restrained professionalism

ant.notes: Use a calm, highly legible sans. Keep mono limited to data or technical metadata.

carbon.notes: Carbon should default to IBM Plex for both credibility and structural clarity.

fluent.notes: Prefer Segoe UI for Microsoft-adjacent work. Keep the tone practical and calm.

atlassian.notes: Choose a straightforward collaborative product voice with high legibility.

apple_hig.notes: Stay close to platform feel. Avoid decorative display typography.

polaris.notes: Keep merchant UI friendly, direct, and highly readable.

material.notes: Roboto is the stable Material default. Outfit can soften more branded variants.

m3_pastel.notes: Use clean rounded sans choices to support softer surfaces.

minimal.notes: Let typography disappear into structure. Avoid loud display fonts.

swiss.notes: Typography is architecture. Favor restraint and precision.

glass.notes: Readable sans forms are critical because translucent surfaces already reduce clarity.

neumorphism.notes: Keep fonts simple and readable to offset low-contrast surfaces.

claymorphism.notes: Rounded, soft sans-serif pairings fit the inflated geometry best.

neo_brutalism.notes: Favor assertive display weight and hard contrast.

neo_m3.notes: Use bold product typography with monospace reserved for technical emphasis.

skeuomorphism.notes: Use serif display carefully, then anchor body text with a restrained sans.
